ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArvinLovegood/go-stock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArvinLovegood/go-stock
Language: go
🦄🦄🦄AI赋能股票分析：AI加持的股票分析/选股工具。股票行情获取，AI热点资讯分析，AI资金/财务分析，涨跌报警推送。支持A股，港股，美股。支持市场整体/个股情绪分析，AI辅助选股等。数据全部保留在本地。支持DeepSeek，OpenAI， Ollama，LMStudio，AnythingLLM，硅基流动，火山方舟，阿里云百炼等平台或模型。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NoFxAiOS/nofx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NoFxAiOS/nofx
Language: go
AI Trading OS: Multi-AI, multi-exchange trading infrastructure with Strategy Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apernet/hysteria
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apernet/hysteria
Language: go
Hysteria is a powerful, lightning fast and censorship resistant proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source AI-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /AI MCP gateway and auth server with web UI supporting MCP, A2A, OAuth 2.1, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cert-manager/cert-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager
Language: go
Automatically provision and manage TLS certificates in Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudflare/terraform-provider-cloudflare
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudflare/terraform-provider-cloudflare
Language: go
Cloudflare Terraform Provider

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker/cli
Language: go
The Docker CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fatedier/frp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fatedier/frp
Language: go
A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gofiber/fiber
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gofiber/fiber
Language: go
⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/alloy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/alloy
Language: go
OpenTelemetry Collector distribution with programmable pipelines

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/consul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/consul
Language: go
Consul is a distributed, highly available, and data center aware solution to connect and configure applications across dynamic, distributed infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krillinai/KrillinAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krillinai/KrillinAI
Language: go
Video translation and dubbing tool powered by LLMs. The video translator offers 100 language translations and one-click full-process deployment. The video translation output is optimized for platforms like YouTube，TikTok. AI视频翻译配音工具，100种语言双向翻译，一键部署全流程，可以生抖音，小红书，哔哩哔哩，视频号，TikTok，Youtube等形态的内容成适配

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ltaoo/wx_channels_download
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ltaoo/wx_channels_download
Language: go
微信视频号下载器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mark3labs/mcp-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go
Language: go
A Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling seamless integration between LLM applications and external data sources and tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

URL: https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server
Language: go
High-Performance server for NATS.io, the cloud and edge native messaging system.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/httpx
Language: go
httpx is a fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit that allows running multiple probes using the retryablehttp library.
